title: Animal Garden - Vicuna
description: This mod adds the relatives of the llama, the vicuña as shearable animal into the game.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WpQiC9rN/images/0f314990b3ecd8eed56d4308c2eba8ceceba6b97.gif)

This mod adds the relatives of the llama, the vicuña as shearable animal into the game.

 

They are **herbivores** (plant-eaters), so they need grass or wheat items for **taming and breeding** 

and are **diurnal**, meaning that they are active during daylight hours and rest or sleep at night.

Also it can be **sheared** and after eating grass from the ground it can restore its wool (like the sheep, and dispenser works on them)

There is a 50% chance that it **drops** yellow, orange and white **wool** and 100% chance for brown wool **when sheared**.

And there is a 20% chance a **leader**(male) will spawn that is slighty larger and the others(smaller ones) will follow it.

They are very timid and shy animals and will run away when another creature is near to them.

 

Just like in my other animal mods the mobs have 3 type of behavior that can be changed when interaction with them (a message shows up so you know which behavior it is using)

(**wandering - resting - following**)

So you can make them stay at a place when put in resting mode.

 

They live on higher-altitude places like windswept biomes or stony peaks.

You can change this and other **spawn settings**
by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders
or via resource pack,

but in fabric some spawn settings like the weight, min, max have to be edited in the config file

 

This mod currently supports:

**Forge       26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1 | 1.18.2**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric      26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**
